word: G2715 - κατεξουσιάζω - katexousiázō - kat-ex-oo-see-ad'-zo - Exercise authority

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κατεξουσιάζω

- Transliteration: Katexousiazo

- Phonetic: kat-ex-oo-see-ad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to exercise authority, wield power

- Origin: from G2596 and G1850

- TDNT entry: 11:35,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G1850; to have (wield) full privilege over: - exercise authority.
